decks.notes: The main theme of this Mono Green Aggro deck is to quickly build up a board presence with low mana cost creatures and use various buffs and abilities to overwhelm the opponent. The deck includes cards that provide mana acceleration, card draw, and creature removal to support the aggressive playstyle. By efficiently utilizing the creatures' abilities and using cards like Escape Tunnel and Mightform Harmonizer, the deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent and secure a fast victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly build a strong board presence and overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays. By utilizing cards like Ba Sing Se, Badgermole Cub, and Earthbender Ascension, this Mono Green Aggro deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early in the game. Supporting cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Sazh's Chocobo help to maintain the aggression, while Escape Tunnel and Fabled Passage provide mana fixing and ramp. The goal is to establish a dominant board state and close out the game before the opponent can stabilize.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by countering opponent's spells, targeting their creatures, and drawing cards to maintain card advantage. The deck utilizes efficient removal spells like Burst Lightning and Sear, counterspells such as Spell Pierce and Spell Snare, and card draw spells like Opt and Sleight of Hand. The creatures in the deck provide additional ways to control the board, with options like bouncing opponent's creatures or dealing direct damage. Overall, the deck aims to outmaneuver the opponent and disrupt their game plan while steadily building towards a victory.

The main strategy of this Mono Green Aggro deck is to quickly swarm the board with low cost creatures like Llanowar Elves and Badgermole Cub, while utilizing cards like Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer to buff up your creatures and push for damage. Escape Tunnel and Fabled Passage provide ramp and fixing, allowing you to consistently play threats. Promising Vein and Sapling Nursery help generate tokens for added pressure. Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker and Mossborn Hydra provide additional threats for late game wide and tall board states. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive start.

The main focus of this deck is to aggressively control the board, using efficient spells like Burst Lightning and Slickshot Show-Off to quickly deal damage to the opponent. Drake Hatcher and Riverpyre Verge provide additional threats on the battlefield, while Into the Flood Maw and Multiversal Passage offer versatility in removal options. The deck aims to maintain card advantage through Sleight of Hand and Opt, enabling the player to consistently apply pressure to the opponent. Overall, the deck prioritizes speed and efficiency in order to overwhelm the opponent and secure a victory.

The deck focuses on using cheap spells and creatures to put pressure on the opponent early in the game. It includes cards that allow for resource manipulation like Boomerang Basics and Sleight of Hand, as well as creatures with evasion like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off. The deck's key strategy is to quickly build a board presence and maintain card advantage through its card draw spells. With a mix of burn spells like Burst Lightning and versatile creatures, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and finish them off before they can stabilize.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by using counterspells and removal spells to disrupt your opponent's strategy. By using cards like Spell Snare, Spell Pierce, and Burst Lightning, you can prevent your opponent from playing their threats while dealing damage to them as well. Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental are great blockers to stall the game until you can establish control. Utilize cards like Opt and Sleight of Hand to dig through your deck and find your key pieces. Overall, this deck aims to outlast and outsmart your opponent through careful planning and resource management.

This deck focuses on utilizing fast and efficient mono green creatures to overwhelm the opponent quickly. By playing cards like Ba Sing Se, Badgermole Cub, and Earthbender Ascension, the goal is to apply early pressure and control the board with high-powered creatures. Cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Promising Vein provide additional support to boost the creatures' strength. Fabled Passage helps to fix mana while Escape Tunnel and Sazh's Chocobo provide evasion and protection. With a mix of ramp, aggression, and card advantage, this deck aims to win before the opponent can stabilize.

The main goal of this deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bring them back onto the battlefield through reanimation spells. By using cards like Day of Black Sun and Bitter Triumph, the player can set up their graveyard with targets for their reanimation cards like Doomsday Excruciator and Requiting Hex. Additionally, cards like Duress and Deadly Cover-Up help control the opponent's hand and graveyard, while Insatiable Avarice and Superior Spider-Man provide additional value and card advantage. The deck's strategy revolves around efficiently utilizing resources to outvalue and overwhelm the opponent.

This deck focuses on utilizing a combination of cards to bring powerful creatures back from the graveyard to the battlefield. By using cards like Deceit, Winternight Stories, and Doomsday Excruciator, the player can create powerful combos that can overwhelm their opponent. The deck includes cards like Bitter Triumph and Day of Black Sun to control the board and protect their creatures. With cards like Requiting Hex and Insatiable Avarice, the player can continuously revive their creatures and maintain board presence. The deck also features cards like Duress for disruption and control elements.

This deck focuses on using various combo pieces to quickly fill up the graveyard with powerful creatures, then bringing them back onto the battlefield for a game-winning play. It utilizes cards like Restless Reef and Superior Spider-Man to enable the reanimation strategy, while also including disruption spells like Duress to control the opponent's hand. The key strategy is to set up a strong board presence by reanimating creatures like Oildeep Gearhulk or Harvester of Misery, overwhelming the opponent with powerful threats.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells in order to deal damage quickly and efficiently. By combining low cost creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off with burn spells like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent, the deck aims to maintain board control and pressure the opponent. The use of cards like Sleight of Hand and Opt allows for card selection and manipulation to ensure that the deck can consistently draw into its key threats and answers.

This deck focuses on fast and aggressive play, utilizing low-cost creatures and burn spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent. The strategy revolves around quickly overwhelming the opponent with a combination of creatures and direct damage, while also providing some control elements with cards like Lightning Strike and Sear. The goal is to end the game as quickly as possible, using a mix of creature attacks and burn spells to secure victory before the opponent can stabilize and turn the tide.

The deck focuses on using a mix of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells in order to quickly overwhelm the opponent and control the battlefield. By combining powerful creatures like Floodpits Drowner and Spyglass Siren with cards like Requiting Hex and Enduring Curiosity, the deck aims to apply pressure early on and maintain card advantage throughout the game. With cards like Multiversal Passage and Wan Shi Tong, Librarian providing flexibility and resource generation, the deck is designed to keep the opponent on the back foot and dictate the pace of the match.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly overwhelm and outpace your opponent by utilizing a combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells. By constantly pressuring your opponent with efficient threats like Floodpits Drowner and Spyglass Siren, while also disrupting their game plan with cards like Requiting Hex and Shoot the Sheriff, you can quickly gain control of the game. The deck aims to maintain a versatile game plan through card draw and removal options, allowing you to adapt to various matchups and strategies.

This mono green aggro deck focuses on quickly building up a strong board presence with efficient creatures and using pump spells to overwhelm the opponent. The deck includes cards like Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer to buff creatures, as well as Sazh's Chocobo and Badgermole Cub for aggressive early game plays. Utilizing mana ramp with Llanowar Elves and efficient removal with Royal Treatment, the deck aims to apply constant pressure on the opponent and close out the game quickly.
